name: display-matrix
description: Penumbra ADR 0011 / spec/PENUMBRA_WORKLOAD.md — Cartesian sweep over the shipped DisplayState preset catalog. Each test fixes a single (scene × preset) pair to lock the preset surface end-to-end. Adding a new preset to Penumbra/packages/runtime/src/display-presets/ should be matched here. Run with --mode pixel-diff for regression coverage; --mode vlm for correctness via the vlmDescription baked into each test.
